name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.CombinedDimensionAttributes
summary: The CombinedDimensionAttributes class handles attributes related to the combination of identical parts of dimensions.

constructors.name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.CombinedDimensionAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new combined dimension attributes instance. The defaults combine a minimum of three identical dimensions to be shown as the number of items times the length of the dimension.

constructors.name: DimensionSetBaseAttributes.CombinedDimensionAttributes
constructors.summary: Creates a new combined dimension attributes instance with the given parameters.

params.name: minimumNumberToCombine
params.doc: The minimum number of dimensions to be combined.

params.name: format
params.doc: The format of the combined dimensions.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

properties.name: MinimumNumberToCombine
properties.summary: The minimum number of dimensions to be combined.
